name: Suspicious URL / Link Submission
description: Employee wants security to check a URL, either before clicking or after they already clicked.
title: Check a Suspicious Link
intro:
Not sure about a link? Send it over. We'll check whether it's safe and let you know.

If you've already clicked it, that's okay, just tell us below so we can check whether anything needs to be done on your device.
submit_message: Thanks. We'll review the link and email you back. If you already entered any credentials, please change that password from a different device while you wait.

fields.label: Your email
fields.help: We'll reply with what we find.

fields.label: The suspicious link
fields.help: Paste the full URL. If it was a shortened link (bit.ly etc.), paste that too.

fields.label: Where did you see this link?
Did you click the link?
fields.help: Be honest, we don't judge. It helps us prioritize.
options: Yes, I clicked but didn't enter anything
Yes, I clicked and entered my username/password
Yes, I clicked and downloaded a file
fields.sample_value: Yes, I clicked but didn't enter anything

fields.label: What made it feel off?
fields.help: A sentence or two. Urgent tone? Misspelled sender? Odd domain?
fields.placeholder: Tell us what raised your eyebrow.
fields.sample_value: Email said my Microsoft 365 account would be locked in 24 hours unless I verified my password. Sender address was 'security@m1crosoft-alerts.com' which looked wrong, and the link domain ended in .tk.

fields.label: Screenshot of the message or page (optional)
fields.help: Helps us see what you saw without you having to forward anything.

fields.label: Device where you saw / clicked the link
fields.help: Hostname, asset tag, or a quick description.

alert_template.title: Suspicious URL reported by {{reporter_email}}: {{url}}
